title: First Love
overview: Yukari Nejima has been in love with Misaki Tazaki since grade school. He finally builds the confidence to confess his feelings, but nothing goes as planned.

title: A Small Lie
overview: Neji has now been appointed a wife by the government. When he meets his future wife Ririna, he’s surprised by her reaction when he reveals his secret.

title: Overlooked Love
overview: Ririna invites Neji over to her house only to find Misaki already there. It’s apparent that Ririna has other plans for her assigned husband.

title: The Science of Love
overview: Love is complicated when you’re inside the Yukari system. Neji and Ririna must navigate the ministry together if they want their lie to come out intact.

title: Risky Love
overview: The camping trip seems to be going well until all four them are forced to confront certain truths about their relationship.

title: A Prison to Compel Love
overview: Neji and Ririna have been assigned a special lecture, things take an awkward turn when they realize the nature of the lecture.

title: A Silent Lie
overview: Ririna is confused about her feelings for Neji, especially after the special lecture. Meanwhile, Misaki questions her role in Neji and Ririna’s life.

title: Feelings Without Lies
overview: Neji delves deeper into this friendship with Nisaki, and learns Misaki’s true feelings about his relationship with Ririna.

title: So Bright It Doesn't Seem Real
overview: With the Romeo and Juliet play about to begin, Neji has a heart to heart with Nisaka about his feelings for the girls.

title: A Love to Give Everything For
overview: Shuu tries to shed light on Misaki’s situation to Ririna and Neji, she also reveals more about the notices and its origins.

title: I Don’t Care If It’s A Lie
overview: Feelings start to be questioned when the gang ends up at a wedding, and Misaki can’t help but wish for a lie of her own.

title: Love And Lies
overview: Naji is forced to face his growing feelings for Ririna head on. With so much on the line, what will happen when these emotions finally start clashing?
